title: Agathyrsus alpinus
taxonomy: Agathyrsus alpinus is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This family is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Within the family Rubiaceae, Agathyrsus alpinus is classified in the genus Agathyrsus. The genus Agathyrsus is further divided into several species, with Agathyrsus alpinus being one of them. Agathyrsus alpinus is a tropical plant native to certain regions, and its classification is used in botanical research and conservation efforts.
uses: Agathyrsus alpinus, although less commonly referenced, is believed to have several medicinal uses.
